login.intro: Capture roles in one click. Watch replies land. Decide what's next from one calm view — without the spreadsheet.
login.localFooter: Locally hosted. Your data stays on your machine.
login.title: Sign in
login.passwordHint: Single-user mode. Use the password from your .env file.

forays.title: Forays
forays.subtitle: Every role you've applied to. Filter by status to focus the view.
forays.emptyCaptureFirst: Capture your first role to start tracking. Drag the bookmarklet from Settings, or add one manually.
forays.loadError: Could not load forays. Try refreshing.

newForay.title: Capture a foray
newForay.subtitle: Log a role you applied to or are about to apply to.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitleEmpty: Classified emails the matcher was confident about have already been routed.
inbox.subtitleOne: 1 email the classifier wasn't confident about. Confirm or override.
inbox.subtitleMany: {n} emails the classifier wasn't confident about. Confirm or override.
inbox.emptyBody: No emails waiting for review. New ones will appear here when the classifier isn't confident about a label.
inbox.degradationDisconnected: Gmail disconnected — full bodies unavailable. <link>Connect Gmail in Settings</link>.
inbox.degradationStale: Last sync was over 5 days ago. Gmail Test-mode tokens expire after 7 days. <link>Reconnect in Settings</link>.

today.decisionsEmpty: Nothing waiting on you right now.
today.quietSubtitle: {n} forays you might want to nudge
today.globalEmptyBody: Capture a foray (⌘K) or open your pipeline.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Connect Gmail, install the bookmarklet, manage your local foray instance.

gmail.title: Gmail
gmail.intro: The classifier reads your inbox to spot replies, interview invites, and rejections. Subjects and 500-char excerpts are stored; full bodies are fetched on demand.
gmail.tokenStaleBody: Google may revoke the refresh token after 7 days when the OAuth consent screen is in Test mode. Reconnect Gmail to keep syncing.

bookmarklet.title: Bookmarklet
bookmarklet.intro: One-click capture from any job posting. Drag the button to your bookmarks bar — page title, URL, and any selected text get pre-filled into a new foray.
bookmarklet.notBuilt: Run pnpm build:bookmarklet to generate the bookmarklet.
bookmarklet.step1: Drag the button above to your browser's bookmark bar.
bookmarklet.step2: Or right-click → Bookmark This Link, then choose your folder.
bookmarklet.usage: Click the bookmark while on any job posting. You'll land on the new foray form with everything captured.

language.title: Language
language.intro: Interface language. Job content (titles, JDs, emails) stays in its source language.
